message.content:
你是獨立驗證者（與發現此問題的 reviewer 不同 context）。盡力反駁以下 finding 是真問題——它可能是誤報。
若你能證明它不是問題（誤讀程式碼 / 已被別處處理 / 不在執行路徑），判 isReal=false。若反駁失敗，判 isReal=true。
Finding：{"severity":"medium","where":"assets/Script/SlotReels.ts:959-967 (TriggerDropOut INV-4 冪等鍵) 與 Finding-1 的修法衝突","problem":"INV-4 用 `m_isInDropMode` 同時當『凍結旗標』與『冪等鍵』。若採 Finding-1 建議在 StartSpin 設 m_isInDropMode=true 來補回凍結,則 TriggerDropOut 的 `if(m_isInDropMode)return`(L961)會誤判為『已觸發』而永不建立 m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise → drop-in L1979 await null 立即放行 → 掉落動畫完全不播。即:現行設計把『凍結語意』和『掉落是否已觸發』耦合在同一個 bool,使 Finding-1 無法用最簡方式修復。這是雙真相來源拆分不徹底的後果(規格 §5.1 自承雙狀態負擔,但未察覺冪等鍵與凍結鍵應分離)。","fix":"冪等鍵改用『promise 是否已建立』而非 m_isInDropMode:TriggerDropOut 改 `if(this.m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise)return; this.m_isInDropMode=true; this.m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise=this.DropAllSymbolsOutOfScreen();`。如此凍結旗標(m_isInDropMode)可由 StartSpin 先行設 true 補回窗口凍結(Finding-1),而冪等性由 promise 非 null 把關,兩職責解耦。drop-in INV-2 清除順序維持不變(三者同步清)。","lens":"correctness"}
審查目標：【審查對象】本次 working tree 未 commit 的改動，共 3 檔，主題：把「舊盤面掉出畫面」(DropAllSymbolsOutOfScreen) 延後到大獎預告 ShowBigAwardHint 之後播放（一般遊戲 + FG）。

【改動清單】
1. SlotReels.ts：
   - 新增 `private m_isInDropMode: boolean` 純扛「掉落期間凍結轉輪」職責；`m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise` 降格為純動畫 handle。
   - 新增 `public TriggerDropOut()`：冪等 guard `if (m_isInDropMode) return`，否則同步 `m_isInDropMode=true` + 建立掉落 promise（INV-1/INV-4）。
   - `StartSpin()`：移除原 L943 立即觸發掉落；在 `m_isStop=false` 同區補 `m_isInDropMode=false`（INV-3 每局兜底）。
   - `Spin()` 凍結判定 `if (m_isInDropMode || m_isStop) return`（原本判 promise 非 null）；L1268 `if(IsStop)return` 不動。
   - `DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo()` drop-in 解除改原子順序：StartFallAll await 之後「`m_isStop=true` → `promise=null` → `m_isInDropMode=false`」三行連續同步無 await 間隔（INV-2 防離開態一幀脫韁）。
2. GameView.ts：`OnRecvSpinAck` 在 `await ShowBigAwardHint`(L1642) 之後、`SetNowRoundInfo`(L1664) 之前插入 `this.m_slotReels.TriggerDropOut()`（normal/unshow/Demo 共用）。
3. GameState/SpinState.ts：FG 分支重排——`SetNowRoundInfo` 從 hint 前移到 `await ShowBigAwardHint` 之後，並在其前插 `this.m_gameView.SlotReels.TriggerDropOut()`。SET_REMAINING_ROUND dispatch 用區域變數 thisRoundInfo 保持原位。

【設計規格】完整在 G:\Cocos_Project\uk_pirates_queen\.claude-loop\artifacts\P1-design-spec.md（含 F1-F14 事實求證、BC-1~6、INV-1~4、§4 因果鏈、§5 風險）。

【請重點對抗驗證 / 已知殘留風險，務必獨立查證勿照單全收】
1. ⚠️ §4.6 medium：FG 重排使 `GameView.SetNowRoundInfo` 內 `Dispatch(SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA, ...)`(GameView L1766 區) 從「hint 前」延後到「hint 後」。**請窮舉 WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA 的訂閱者**，判斷有無訂閱者依賴懸賞令在 hint 前完成 → 視覺/邏輯異常。
2. 死鎖/競態：窮舉 normal / FG / unshow / hardstop / autospin / MgOmen(dormant) 各組合，獨立驗證「掉落 promise 在 drop-in 的 L1955 await 前必已建立且最終 resolve」、「無 await-null 提前放行」、「INV-2 原子順序真能消除離開態一幀脫韁」。
3. MgOmen 分支（F10 宣稱 grep=0 賦值恆 false dormant）：獨立 grep 複驗 `IsMgOmen\s*=` 是否真為 0；若非 0，BC-5「靠 INV-3 兜底」是否仍成立。
4. INV-4 冪等是否真能防同一局重複 TriggerDropOut；TriggerDropOut 公開後有無其他非預期呼叫風險。
5. 是否有遺漏的 StartSpin→掉落觸發路徑未被任一 path-aware TriggerDropOut 覆蓋（移除 L943 後的回歸面）。

【限制】禁改公版 extensions/astarte-framework。TypeScript，驗證 `npx tsc --noEmit`（注意專案有既有 cc.d.ts/@types 噪音，assets/Script 為 0 錯）。
用 Read/Grep 實際查證程式碼，不要憑空判斷。

attachment.content:
- claude-mem-curate: 把 claude-mem 抽出的 shortlist 精選成少量繁體中文、去重後寫進 AIMemory。當使用者說「精選/整理 claude-mem」「把最近重點存記憶」,或每日自動 ingestion 時使用。
- dual-skill-review-loop: Use when producing any deliverable that needs quality assurance — writing, reports, proposals, code designs — and you want the output to reach ≥95 score through structured self-review iterations
- excel-to-ai-doc: Convert image-heavy Excel game spec spreadsheets (.xlsx) into an AI-readable knowledge structure — Markdown text + extracted original images (anchored to their source cells) + metadata.json. Use when the user wants to turn a 規格書/spec/design xlsx into something an AI or agent can read, asks to "convert this spec to markdown", "make this xlsx AI-readable", "extract images and tables from this spreadsheet for analysis", or needs to feed a slot/game spec workbook to a vision model. Triggers on game design specs, paytables, UI/flow screenshots embedded in .xlsx. NOT for clean tabular data exports (use a plain csv/markdown converter) or non-xlsx files.
- huashu-slides: AI演示文稿全流程制作：内容结构化→设计选型→AI插画/HTML构建→PPTX导出。17种实战验证的视觉风格（漫画/极简/数据叙事/国风），可编辑HTML与全AI视觉两条路径自由选择。当用户提到"做PPT"、"制作幻灯片"、"演示文稿"、"Keynote"、"slides"、"课件"、"汇报材料"、"路演"时使用。
- knowhow-accumulation: Use when capturing lessons from AI failures into structured ❌→✅ records, when reviewing past interactions to extract reusable patterns, or when building a self-improving knowledge base from repeated mistakes
- memory-to-skill: 當使用者要求「檢視 session 資料夾並把內容整理成 skill」、需要從過去對話中抽取可重用模式、或要把剛剛完成的工作經驗固化成 skill 時使用
- ms-agent-scheduled-prompts: 當需要為 LLM agent bridge（Telegram bot、Slack bot、CLI UI）做延遲 / 常態性 prompt 觸發、排程 bridge 指令（如每天凌晨 /restart）、或要在 agent 回覆裡嵌 token 讓使用者自助建排程時使用
- ms-agent-text-token-signaling: 當 LLM agent 需要觸發 host 端動作（傳檔、開網址、執行指令）但協定不允許 agent 端發起自訂 RPC、或想在 streaming 文字回覆中加上 side effect 又不破壞聊天 UX 時使用
- ms-kiro-strreplace-silent-fail: 當用 Kiro 的 strReplace 或 fs-edit 類工具改檔、tool 回報 Successfully replaced N occurrences 但事後 grep / read 發現磁碟內容沒變、或同一個檔案連續發幾個 strReplace 只有部分生效時使用
- ms-portable-skill-authoring: 當寫 skill 會被多個 agent CLI（Kiro / Codex / Claude）或多台機器共用、要避免把 F:\AI\AIMemory 或 ~/.kiro 這類絕對路徑寫死在 SKILL.md、或要讓 bridge 把環境差異注入成變數讓同一份 SKILL.md 跨機器重用時使用
- ms-streaming-token-pipeline: Use when a Telegram/Slack bot streams text via mid-turn edits plus a final render. Both paths must share one transform, or ASK buttons drop, half-tokens leak, and rate-limit recovery overwrites it.
- ms-telegram-ask-button-protocol: Use when emitting <<ASK:...>> for Telegram bridge buttons, or when an ASK token renders verbatim. Label soft cap 20 chars; >20 SHALL use numbered body list with short labels. See SKILL.md for limits.
- ms-telegram-bot-rate-limit-survival: 當 Telegram bot 對使用者 chat 串 streaming edit 或連發多則訊息、遇到 429 Too Many Requests / retry_after 愈累積愈長（60s→183s）、grammY autoRetry 超過 maxDelaySeconds 拋錯、或需要設計「限流期間凍結 UI + 限流結束後自動補發」時使用
- ms-windows-shell-exit-code-false-positive: 當在 Windows PowerShell 或 cmd.exe 中跑 git clone、pip install、npm install、winget 等命令時，明明工作完成卻收到 exit code 1、stderr 有進度條或 notice、shell tool 回報失敗時使用
- ms-windows-shell-interactive-prompt: 當在 Windows PowerShell 或 cmd.exe 中執行讀檔、列目錄、搜尋指令（Get-Content、type、cat、more）導致 tool call 卡住不回、或在 Kiro agent 與 ACP bridge 裡看到 PowerShell 的互動式參數詢問（例如 Path 參數提示）時使用
- non-engineer-agent-design: Use when designing Custom GPT / Claude Project / Gemini Gem instructions for non-engineers, or when helping someone structure their AI workflow using the 5-piece framework (Agent, Skill, Steering, Hook, KnowHow)
- self-eval-prompt-pattern: Use when designing prompts or instructions that require AI to self-assess quality before delivering output, when setting up automated quality gates in Custom GPT / Project / Gem instructions, or when AI outputs need measurable pass/fail criteria
- skill-creator: Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.
- sync-fork-from-upstream: 當使用者要把自己的 fork / 下游倉庫同步到原專案（upstream）的最新更新時使用。觸發語包含「同步原專案」「拿上游更新」「sync upstream」「更新原專案」「原本的倉庫有更新怎麼拉」。涵蓋一次性 upstream remote 設定、半自動同步流程（fetch → 拋棄式分支試合併 → 型別檢查 → 停在衝突/失敗、絕不自動 push）、以及 fork 與 upstream 無共同歷史時的「重新接血脈」做法。
- ui-ux-pro-max: ui-ux-pro-max
- uk-slot-extrabet: UK 老虎機 ExtraBet（額外押注/加倍投注）子系統指南。建立、修改、除錯 ExtraBet 功能，或處理 unshow/replay 還原、單倍率單步驟 / 多倍率兩步驟跳窗變體、多倍率 type 時觸發。涵蓋 framework ExtraBetComponent / extraBetController、專案 ExtraBetWindow 跳窗、ExtraBetEffectManager 動畫、SlotReels 假轉輪整合、GameView 整合多方關係。
- uk-slot-fake-reel-manager: FakeReelManager 假轉輪帶建立、修改、檢查或擴充
- uk-slot-multilang-sync: 把規格 xlsx 的多國語言文字批次同步進 uk 線上老虎機框架各語系的 gameStrings.xml。當使用者要在老虎機專案新增/更新多國語言字串、提到 「gameStrings.xml」「多國語言」「多語系文字」「i18n 字串」「把 xlsx 的翻譯填進去」、 或要為某個 Key 一次寫入多國(常見 26 國)文字時使用。僅適用線上部門 uk 框架 (plist 格式 gameStrings.xml、每語系一目錄、欄標題括號內為語系代碼); 商用部門或其他文字格式不適用。
- uk-slot-project-docs: uk-slot-project-docs
- uk-slot-state-machine: UK 老虎機狀態機設定，新增、移除或修改 SetStateMachine() 遊戲狀態時觸發。
- vc-kiro-delegate: 將實作任務委派給 Kiro CLI（headless mode + claude-opus-4.6）執行，把主 agent 的 Claude Max 5x 配額（5 小時 message cap）保留給協調與決策，把實作丟給 Kiro 的不限量訂閱算力。Claude Code 負責預估、規劃、light review；Kiro 負責具體實作與第一輪 self-review。當用戶說「用 kiro 做」「交給 kiro」「省 token」「叫 kiro 寫」時務必使用此 skill；當主 agent 自己評估某個任務「預估會花 2k+ tokens」時也要主動委派 — 例如新增函式、寫測試、重構函式、實作模組。即使用戶沒明說「kiro」，只要預估產出規模 ≥2k tokens，就主動委派並在訊息中告知預估值。
- writing-skills: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment
- dev:init-claude: dev:init-claude — 開發設計閉環初始化
- sc:analyze: Comprehensive code analysis across quality, security, performance, and architecture domains
- sc:brainstorm: Interactive requirements discovery through Socratic dialogue and systematic exploration
- sc:build: Build, compile, and package projects with intelligent error handling and optimization
- sc:business-panel: /sc:business-panel - Business Panel Analysis System
- sc:cleanup: Systematically clean up code, remove dead code, and optimize project structure
- sc:design: Design system architecture, APIs, and component interfaces with comprehensive specifications
- sc:document: Generate focused documentation for components, functions, APIs, and features
- sc:estimate: Provide development estimates for tasks, features, or projects with intelligent analysis
- sc:explain: Provide clear explanations of code, concepts, and system behavior with educational clarity
- sc:git: Git operations with intelligent commit messages and workflow optimization
- sc:help: List all available /sc commands and their functionality
- sc:implement: Feature and code implementation with intelligent persona activation and MCP integration
- sc:improve: Apply systematic improvements to code quality, performance, and maintainability
- sc:index: Generate comprehensive project documentation and knowledge base with intelligent organization
- sc:load: Session lifecycle management with Serena MCP integration for project context loading
- sc:reflect: Task reflection and validation using Serena MCP analysis capabilities
- sc:save: Session lifecycle management with Serena MCP integration for session context persistence
- sc:select-tool: Intelligent MCP tool selection based on complexity scoring and operation analysis
- sc:spawn: Meta-system task orchestration with intelligent breakdown and delegation
- sc:spec-panel: Multi-expert specification review and improvement using renowned specification and software engineering experts
- sc:task: Execute complex tasks with intelligent workflow management and delegation
- sc:test: Execute tests with coverage analysis and automated quality reporting
- sc:troubleshoot: Diagnose and resolve issues in code, builds, deployments, and system behavior
- sc:workflow: Generate structured implementation workflows from PRDs and feature requirements
- uk-conventions: 把 UK 老虎機開發規範（禁改公版 + 命名規則）寫入當前專案的 CLAUDE.md（冪等，不重複貼）
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dev-design: 架構設計 workflow（取代閉環 Phase 1+1b）：多方案 judge-panel → 對抗驗證砍缺陷 → 設計規格（含 BC-x）。承重核（因果鏈+事實求證）注入每個 agent。
- dev-prd: PRD / 需求探索 workflow（新能力，原方法論無 PRD 階段）：多角度需求探索（problem/user/scope）→ 塑形候選（lean/complete）→ 對抗挑戰 → PRD 文件。事實求證確保需求前提不是憑空假設。
- dev-review: 品質+安全審查 workflow（取代閉環 Phase 3）：parallel 多視角審查（correctness/security/repro lens）→ 對抗驗證 findings。異源 skeptic 打破同源自審天花板（#007）。
- dev-verify: 跨產出物自證 workflow（取代閉環 Phase 5，可選）：可枚舉項用 adversarial-verify；反向遍歷（找死碼/未實作）用輕量 verifier agent（這是 adversarial-verify 結構上蓋不到的缺口）。
- claude-md-management:revise-claude-md: Update CLAUDE.md with learnings from this session
- claude-mem:do: Execute a plan using subagents for implementation
- claude-mem:make-plan: Create an implementation plan with documentation discovery
- codex:rescue: Delegate investigation, an explicit fix request, or follow-up rescue work to the Codex rescue subagent
- codex:setup: Check whether the local Codex CLI is ready and optionally toggle the stop-time review gate
- webwright:craft: Craft a reusable Webwright CLI tool by parameterizing a web task.
- webwright:run: Run a one-shot web task with the Webwright Playwright workflow.
- claude-md-management:claude-md-improver: Audit and improve CLAUDE.md files in repositories. Use when user asks to check, audit, update, improve, or fix CLAUDE.md files. Scans for all CLAUDE.md files, evaluates quality against templates, outputs quality report, then makes targeted updates. Also use when the user mentions "CLAUDE.md maintenance" or "project memory optimization".
- superpowers:brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies
- superpowers:executing-plans: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints
- superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch: Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work - guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup
- superpowers:receiving-code-review: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing suggestions, especially if feedback seems unclear or technically questionable - requires technical rigor and verification, not performative agreement or blind implementation
- superpowers:requesting-code-review: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements
- superpowers:subagent-driven-development: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session
- superpowers:systematic-debugging: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes
- superpowers:test-driven-development: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code
- superpowers:using-git-worktrees: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - ensures an isolated workspace exists via native tools or git worktree fallback
- superpowers:using-superpowers: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring skill invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
- superpowers:verification-before-completion: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
- superpowers:writing-plans: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code
- superpowers:writing-skills: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment
- claude-mem:mem-search: Search claude-mem's persistent cross-session memory database. Use when user asks "did we already solve this?", "how did we do X last time?", or needs work from previous sessions.
- telegram:access: Manage Telegram channel access — approve pairings, edit allowlists, set DM/group policy. Use when the user asks to pair, approve someone, check who's allowed, or change policy for the Telegram channel.
- telegram:configure: Set up the Telegram channel — save the bot token and review access policy. Use when the user pastes a Telegram bot token, asks to configure Telegram, asks "how do I set this up" or "who can reach me," or wants to check channel status.
- codex:codex-cli-runtime: Internal helper contract for calling the codex-companion runtime from Claude Code
- codex:codex-result-handling: Internal guidance for presenting Codex helper output back to the user
- codex:gpt-5-4-prompting: Internal guidance for composing Codex and GPT-5.4 prompts for coding, review, diagnosis, and research tasks inside the Codex Claude Code plugin
- webwright:webwright: Solve a user-specified web task code-as-action style by driving a local Playwright browser through one bash command at a time, saving screenshots and an action log into `final_runs/run_<id>/`, and visually verifying the result. Use when the user asks to automate a web task (search, filter, form-fill, multi-step flow, data extraction) and wants reusable scripts plus screenshot evidence rather than a one-shot answer.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

119:**閉合策略**：靠 **INV-3 下局兜底**——即使某局 MgOmen 觸發 TriggerDropOut 後 drop-in 被跳過、本局旗標殘留 true，下一局 StartSpin（INV-3）強制 `m_isInDropMode=false`。MgOmen 語意本就是「不能按停的特殊表演」（GameView L599-600 CanPlateStop/CanSpaceStop=false），凍結轉輪與其語意不衝突。
120:**反例**：若無 INV-3 且 MgOmen 啟用 → m_isInDropMode 永久 true → 永久凍結。∴ INV-3 是 MgOmen 閉合的承重保險。
121:**誠實邊界**：MgOmen=true 的真實表演流程（是否經 StartSpin、表演時長）未驗證（dormant 無法觀測）。標「待驗證觸發」，啟用時須回歸。**降級選項**：可先只做 normal+FG，MgOmen 維持 dormant 不額外處理（INV-3 仍兜底）。
138:### 4.1 SlotReels.StartSpin() L853（移除 L943 觸發 + 加 INV-3 重置）

142:### 4.2 SlotReels.Spin() L1274（凍結判定換來源）

167:- **SlotReels.SetPlateInfoForUnshow() L1974**：呼叫者 = UnshowPrepareState（task 述 L108/L129 還原流程），不經 StartSpin、不建立 drop promise、不消費 → 拆分後 m_isInDropMode 保持 false，**零影響**（task 第 5 點 unshow 還原疑慮在此澄清）。
175:2. **雙真相來源**：拆出 m_isInDropMode 後凍結語意由「promise 非 null」改為獨立 bool，新增同步維護負擔（§2.4 INV-1~4）。緩解：四條不變式 + drop-in L1964 同點原子綁定釋放、TriggerDropOut 同點原子綁定設定。
176:   - **評審建議的替代方案**（單 promise + StartSpin 同步建立 resolved 佔位、TriggerDropOut 時替換真動畫 promise）已評估：JS promise 一旦被持有的 reference 無法「替換」，drop-in 可能 await 到舊 resolved 佔位而非真動畫，仍需額外旗標標「是否已替換」→ 未真正消除雙狀態。**判定：不採，維持 bool + INV 契約更直觀可驗。**
182:| MgOmen 若未來啟用 → 凍結生命週期（F10 dormant，BC-5） | 低（dormant）/ 中（若啟用） | INV-3 下局兜底；標「待驗證觸發」，啟用時回歸。降級選項：只做 normal+FG |

186:| 漏改 L1268 / 誤搬凍結到 IsStop（BC-1 反例） | 已防 | 明令只改 L1274，L1268 不動 |

content.text:
Now I have a clear picture. The critical question: **Does Finding-1 actually exist, and does it propose setting `m_isInDropMode=true` in StartSpin?**

The finding under review is entirely premised on "若採 Finding-1 建議在 StartSpin 設 m_isInDropMode=true 來補回凍結" (IF Finding-1 recommends setting m_isInDropMode=true in StartSpin to restore freezing).

Let me analyze whether such a Finding-1 fix is even coherent with the current design.

Key facts from the code and spec:
1. The OLD design (before these changes) triggered drop-out **immediately in StartSpin** at L943. The freeze was active from StartSpin onwards.
2. The NEW design moves the trigger to AFTER `ShowBigAwardHint` (in OnRecvSpinAck / SpinState). This means there is a **window** between StartSpin and TriggerDropOut where neither `m_isInDropMode` nor `m_isStop` is true — i.e., the reels are NOT frozen during that window.

The hypothetical "Finding-1" presumably claims this window is a regression (reels spin/something during the hint window that previously was frozen). And the finding-under-review claims that Finding-1's fix would be to set `m_isInDropMode=true` in StartSpin.

Let me examine whether this conflict claim is actually valid by checking: **if you set `m_isInDropMode=true` in StartSpin, does the L961 guard actually block the later TriggerDropOut?**

Reading L961-967: Yes, `TriggerDropOut()` does `if (this.m_isInDropMode) return;`. So if StartSpin set `m_isInDropMode=true`, then when TriggerDropOut is called later, it returns early and **never creates** `m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise`. Then drop-in at L1979 does `await this.m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise` which is `null` → `await null` resolves immediately → no drop animation plays.

So the **mechanical logic of the conflict is correct** IF Finding-1's fix is as the reviewer assumes. Let me verify the finding isn't misreading — let me confirm the StartSpin window concern is real, and whether the actual Finding-1 (if it exists) proposes this specific fix or something else.

The finding-under-review is a **meta-finding about interaction between two findings**. Its validity hinges on whether Finding-1 genuinely proposes the `m_isInDropMode=true in StartSpin` fix. This is an assumption the reviewer made ("若採 Finding-1 建議..."). Let me check git/working tree for any Finding-1 documentation or check if there's a review artifact.

content.text:
There's no documented "Finding-1" in the artifacts. The finding under review references "Finding-1" as if it's another finding from the same review batch (sibling finding in the current review session). This is a finding that depends on a sibling finding's hypothetical fix.

Let me now critically assess the core question: **Is there actually a freezing regression (the premise of Finding-1) that needs fixing?** If Finding-1's premise is itself a non-issue, then this dependent finding is moot. And more importantly, even if Finding-1 is real, is the proposed conflict a *real defect in the current code* or just advice about how to coordinate two fixes?

Let me examine what actually happens in the window between StartSpin and TriggerDropOut. Let me look at SpinState and the OnRecvSpinAck flow.

Now I understand the full flow. Let me analyze the critical timing question that determines whether Finding-1's premise (a freezing regression) is even real.

In the OLD design: StartSpin set `m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise` immediately → reels frozen from StartSpin → ShowBigAwardHint plays while frozen → drop-in.

In the NEW design: StartSpin does NOT freeze. Then `await ShowBigAwardHint(...)`. During that await, `OnProcess` runs `Spin(dt)`. Since neither `m_isInDropMode` nor `m_isStop` is true, **the reels actually spin during the hint window**.

So the premise of "Finding-1" (a freeze-window regression) appears to be a **real concern**: in the new design, during ShowBigAwardHint, reels are spinning whereas in the old design they were frozen (showing old board dropping out had already been triggered).

Wait — but this is the entire *intent* of the change: "把舊盤面掉出畫面延後到大獎預告之後". The whole point is the old board should STAY ON SCREEN during the hint, then drop AFTER. So during the hint, the reels should be showing the static old board — NOT spinning.

Let me check what `Spin(dt)` actually does to the visible board when not frozen, and whether StartSpin leaves reels in a spinning state. Let me check `m_isStop` initial and whether the symbols visually move.

This confirms StartSpin sets `m_isStop=false` and prepares the reels to spin. So in the new design, during the `await ShowBigAwardHint` window, `OnProcess → Spin(dt)` will actually spin the reels (SpinAll runs since neither freeze flag is set).

This means **Finding-1's premise is plausibly real**: there's a regression window where reels spin during the hint instead of showing the static old board. Whether this is a visible problem depends on hint duration (spec §5.1 note: "常態 hint near-instant, 影響窗口小").

But that's a separate finding. My job is to assess **THIS** finding (the interaction/coupling claim). Let me now do the decisive analysis.

**The decisive question:** Is this finding a *real problem in the current working-tree code*, or is it advice contingent on a hypothetical future fix to a sibling finding?

Reading the finding carefully:
- It does NOT claim the current code is buggy.
- It claims: "現行設計把『凍結語意』和『掉落是否已觸發』耦合在同一個 bool, 使 Finding-1 無法用最簡方式修復" (the current design couples freeze-semantics and trigger-state in one bool, making Finding-1 unfixable via the simplest method).

So this is a **maintainability/forward-compatibility observation about a design coupling**, conditioned on adopting a specific fix for a sibling finding. Let me verify the technical core is actually correct, because if it is, this is a legitimate (if conditional) design observation.

**Verifying the technical core:**
1. `m_isInDropMode` serves dual roles in TriggerDropOut: it IS both the freeze flag AND the idempotency key (L961 guard reads it, L965 sets it). ✓ Confirmed from L959-967.
2. If you set `m_isInDropMode=true` in StartSpin (Finding-1's assumed fix), L961 guard would short-circuit TriggerDropOut → promise never created → `await null` at L1979 → no drop animation. ✓ Mechanically correct.
3. The proposed fix (gate idempotency on `m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise != null` instead) would decouple the two roles. ✓ Technically sound.

Let me verify the proposed fix doesn't itself break INV-2/cross-local serialization. Let me check the SpinState serialization (does promise reliably get nulled between rounds).

content.content:
76	> 拆出 m_isInDropMode 後，凍結真相從「promise 非 null」改為獨立 bool，產生雙狀態同步義務。以下不變式必須在所有設/清點維持，否則卡死或脫韁。
77	
78	- **INV-1（設定綁定）**：`m_isInDropMode = true` 與 `m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise = DropAllSymbolsOutOfScreen()` 必在 TriggerDropOut 內**同步成對設定**，無中間 await。
79	- **INV-2（解除綁定 + 原子順序）**：drop-in 完成時三個寫入**連續同步無 await 間隔**且順序固定：`m_isStop = true` → `promise = null` → `m_isInDropMode = false`。先設停確保「凍結解除瞬間 m_isStop 已 true」，OnProcess 任一幀都不會落入「兩道閘門皆放行」窗口。
80	- **INV-3（每局乾淨起點）**：StartSpin（L858 區）同步重置 `m_isInDropMode = false`。若上一局異常路徑殘留 true，下一局 StartSpin 強制歸零，使旗標生命週期在所有路徑閉合（兜底，非依賴）。
81	- **INV-4（冪等）**：TriggerDropOut 對「已在 drop mode」為 no-op，防止同一局重複觸發建立第二個 promise（孤兒 promise / 旗標重設競態）。
82	
83	---
84	
85	## 3. BC-x 行為契約（可驗證，編號）
86	
87	### BC-1 凍結語意等價且無遺漏 L1268 路徑　[framework-dependent]
88	**契約**：TriggerDropOut() 呼叫後到 drop-in 設 m_isStop=true 之前，任一 `Spin(dt)` 幀都不得執行 SpinAll（舊盤面不被帶動）。
89	**驗證**：此區間 `m_isInDropMode = true`（INV-1）、`m_isStop = false`（F4，L1965 才設 true）。
90	- L1268 `if (this.IsStop) return`：IsStop = m_isStop = false → 不擋（與改動前同，無語意漂移）。
91	- L1274 `if (m_isInDropMode || m_isStop) return`：m_isInDropMode = true → return。凍結由 m_isInDropMode 完整承擔。
92	**反例**：若把凍結誤搬到 L1268 改 IsStop 語意 → 掉落期間 m_isStop=false 會誤放行 → 舊盤面位移一幀。∴ 必須只改 L1274、L1268 不動。
93	**單測點**：`m_isInDropMode=true & m_isStop=false` → Spin 在 L1274 return（不呼叫 SpinAll）。
94	
95	### BC-2 一般遊戲無 await-null 競態　[testable 邏輯序]
96	**契約**：一般遊戲路徑 TriggerDropOut（建立 promise）必先於 drop-in 的 L1955 await。
97	**驗證**：OnRecvSpinAck 同步序 `await ShowBigAwardHint(L1642) → TriggerDropOut（新插入） → SetNowRoundInfo(L1664)`。TriggerDropOut 早於 SetNowRoundInfo → L1955 await 時 promise 非 null。
98	**反例**：若 TriggerDropOut 排到 SetNowRoundInfo 之後 → drop-in await null 立即放行 → 新盤面先落。實測插入點在 L1664 之前 → 不發生。
99	
100	### BC-3 FG 無競態且視覺順序正確　[testable 邏輯序]
101	**契約**：FG 路徑 (a) 掉落 promise 建立先於 drop-in 的 await；(b) 掉落動畫實際播放在 ShowBigAwardHint resolve 之後；(c) 新盤面落下在掉落動畫之後。
102	**驗證**：重排後 FG 序列 `await ShowBigAwardHint(L46) → TriggerDropOut → SetNowRoundInfo(drop-in)`。
103	- (a) TriggerDropOut 早於 SetNowRoundInfo（同步序）→ drop-in await 非 null。
104	- (b) TriggerDropOut 在 hint await 之後才呼叫 → DropAllSymbolsOutOfScreen 動畫在 hint resolve 後才開始。
105	- (c) drop-in L1955 await 掉落 promise resolve → L1963 StartFallAll 新盤面落下。順序鏈成立。
106	**反例**：原 FG 序（drop-in 在 hint 前）若只插 TriggerDropOut 不重排 → 掉落仍先於預告，違反需求。∴ 必須重排 SetNowRoundInfo 到 hint 後。
107	
108	### BC-4 無卡死（promise 必 resolve）+ autospin 無跨局殘留　[testable]
109	**契約**：凡呼叫 TriggerDropOut 的路徑，promise 最終必 resolve 且 m_isInDropMode 必歸 false；第 N 局解凍必早於第 N+1 局 TriggerDropOut。
110	**驗證**：
111	- resolve：DropAllSymbolsOutOfScreen（L951）動畫 ~1.5s 後 resolve；FG 前置 await hint 兩分支皆有限時 resolve（F9）→ 不卡；drop-in L1964 區 INV-2 清 promise+旗標。
112	- 窮舉消費：normal / FG / unshow 皆經 SetPlateInfo(非 MgOmen 分支) → DropSymbolsToBoardByServerPlateInfo 消費。
113	- 跨局：SpinState.OnEnter 每局序列化（前局 drop-in await 完成才 NextState L91），且 INV-3 每局 StartSpin 重置 → N+1 的 TriggerDropOut 不與 N 未 resolve promise 重疊。
114	**反例**：若某路徑無消費者（BC-5 MgOmen）→ 旗標永不清 → INV-3 下局兜底；若無 INV-3 → 永久凍結。∴ INV-3 必要。
115	
116	### BC-5 MgOmen 不造成永久凍結（防禦性，dormant）　[framework-dependent · 待驗證觸發]
117	**契約**：即使 IsMgOmen=true（SetPlateInfo L1711 跳過 drop-in，promise 永不被該局消費），系統不得永久凍結。
118	**現況（F10）**：`IsMgOmen` 賦值點 grep=0，恆 false → 此分支當前**不會觸發**（dormant）。一般遊戲 TriggerDropOut 插入點在 SetNowRoundInfo 之前、無法預知 MgOmen，故不採「MgOmen 不呼叫 TriggerDropOut」。
119	**閉合策略**：靠 **INV-3 下局兜底**——即使某局 MgOmen 觸發 TriggerDropOut 後 drop-in 被跳過、本局旗標殘留 true，下一局 StartSpin（INV-3）強制 `m_isInDropMode=false`。MgOmen 語意本就是「不能按停的特殊表演」（GameView L599-600 CanPlateStop/CanSpaceStop=false），凍結轉輪與其語意不衝突。
120	**反例**：若無 INV-3 且 MgOmen 啟用 → m_isInDropMode 永久 true → 永久凍結。∴ INV-3 是 MgOmen 閉合的承重保險。

content.text:
Now I have everything I need to render a judgment. Let me reason through this carefully.

**Assessment of the finding's validity:**

The finding is a **conditional design-coupling observation**. Let me evaluate it on its own terms.

**Is the technical claim correct?** Yes, mechanically:
- `m_isInDropMode` IS used as both freeze-flag and idempotency-key (L961/L965). Confirmed.
- IF one were to set `m_isInDropMode=true` in StartSpin (the hypothesized Finding-1 fix), THEN L961 would short-circuit TriggerDropOut → no promise → `await null` → no drop animation. Mechanically correct.

**But is this a REAL problem in the code under review?** Here's where I push back hard:

1. **The current code does NOT set `m_isInDropMode=true` in StartSpin.** It explicitly sets it to `false` (L866, INV-3). So the conflict described does **not exist in the working tree**. The finding itself admits this: it's framed entirely as "若採 Finding-1 建議..." (IF Finding-1's fix is adopted...).

2. **The conflict is contingent on a sibling finding (Finding-1) AND a specific assumed fix for it.** Finding-1 is not in the artifacts; it's a sibling finding from the same review batch. The reviewer *assumes* Finding-1's fix is "set m_isInDropMode=true in StartSpin". But that's only ONE possible fix. Finding-1 (the freeze-window concern) could equally be fixed by:
   - Introducing a *separate* `m_freezeReels` flag set in StartSpin (the spec already distinguishes freeze from drop-trigger conceptually).
   - Simply not spinning visually (the symbols may not visibly move much if StopTime logic / reel times aren't set yet — `m_reelStopTime` reset to null at L913).
   - Accepting the window as negligible (spec §5.1 explicitly judges "常態 hint near-instant, 影響窗口小").

3. **The spec already acknowledges the dual-state burden** (§2.4 INV-1~4, §5.1 risk "雙真相來源"). The finding claims the spec "未察覺冪等鍵與凍結鍵應分離" — but actually the design *deliberately* uses `m_isInDropMode` for both because in the CURRENT design they have **identical lifetimes** (set together in TriggerDropOut, cleared together in drop-in). The coupling is correct FOR THE CURRENT DESIGN. It only becomes a problem if you change the freeze flag's lifetime to start earlier (at StartSpin) — which the current code does not do.

**Verdict reasoning:**

This finding does NOT identify a defect in the code under review. It identifies a *potential coordination cost* between two findings, predicated on:
- (a) Finding-1 being real (plausible but unconfirmed — it's a separate finding), AND
- (b) Finding-1's fix being specifically "set m_isInDropMode=true in StartSpin" (an assumption; other fixes exist and are arguably cleaner).

The finding's own severity is "medium" but its content is explicitly hypothetical ("若採"). It is not a bug in the working tree. The current code is internally consistent: idempotency and freeze share a flag *because they share a lifetime*. The finding even concedes the current behavior is correct and only worries about future fixability.

There is a kernel of legitimate insight (the dual-use of `m_isInDropMode` is a latent coupling that constrains certain future fixes). But as a **finding against this changeset's correctness**, it is a false positive: it describes no actual malfunction in the code as written, and its premise depends on a chain of assumptions about a sibling finding's existence and chosen remedy. The proposed fix is a speculative refactor for a problem that doesn't exist yet (YAGNI).

Let me do one final check: confirm there's no path in the current code where `m_isInDropMode` could already be true when TriggerDropOut is called (which would make the L961 guard misfire even WITHOUT Finding-1).

Confirmed. In the current code, the two TriggerDropOut call sites are both AFTER StartSpin (which sets `m_isInDropMode=false`) and there's no path that sets `m_isInDropMode=true` before TriggerDropOut. So in the working tree, the L961 guard never misfires. The conflict only materializes under the hypothetical Finding-1 fix.

I have enough to render judgment.

input.reasoning:
這個 finding 對「本次改動的 working tree」不構成真問題,屬條件式假設 finding(誤報為「changeset 缺陷」)。

【技術核心查證 - 部分成立】
1. m_isInDropMode 確實雙用:L961 當冪等 guard 讀、L965 當凍結旗標寫(SlotReels.ts:959-967 確認)。
2. 「若」在 StartSpin 設 m_isInDropMode=true,則 L961 會 short-circuit TriggerDropOut → promise 永不建立 → drop-in L1979 `await null` 立即放行 → 掉落動畫不播。此機械推導正確。

【為何判 false - 三層反駁】
1. 現行碼不存在此衝突:StartSpin L866 明確設 m_isInDropMode=false(INV-3),且兩個 TriggerDropOut 呼叫點(GameView.ts:1666、SpinState.ts:49)都在 StartSpin 之後。grep 確認無任何路徑在 TriggerDropOut 前把該旗標設 true。∴ L961 guard 在 working tree 永不誤判,掉落動畫正常播。finding 自承全文為「若採 Finding-1 建議...」——前提是假設語氣,非實際缺陷。

2. 依賴鏈過長且未證實:此 finding 依附於 (a) Finding-1 存在(artifacts 中無 Finding-1 文件,為同批 review 的 sibling finding,未獨立驗證), 且 (b) Finding-1 的修法「必為在 StartSpin 設 m_isInDropMode=true」。但 (b) 只是 reviewer 假設的眾多修法之一。Finding-1 的凍結窗口問題(StartSpin→TriggerDropOut 間 OnProcess→Spin 確會跑 SpinAll,premise 本身合理)可用其他方式修:獨立 m_freezeReels 旗標、或接受窗口(spec §5.1 已判「常態 hint near-instant,影響窗口小」)。reviewer 預設了最會撞牆的那種修法再回頭說設計擋路。

3. 當前耦合對當前設計是正確的:m_isInDropMode 在現行設計中,凍結與冪等有「完全相同的生命週期」(TriggerDropOut 同步成對 set, drop-in INV-2 同步成對 clear),共用一個 bool 是合理的(KISS)。它只在「把凍結旗標生命週期提前到 StartSpin」時才需分離——而那是尚不存在的需求(YAGNI)。提議的 promise-非-null 冪等改寫是為「還沒發生的問題」做的投機性 refactor。

【保留】finding 有一個正當的潛在洞見:m_isInDropMode 的雙用是一個 latent coupling,會限制某類未來修法。作為「設計備註/前瞻提醒」有價值。但作為「本 changeset 的 correctness finding」,它描述不出 working tree 任何實際 malfunction,前提鏈又建立在 sibling finding 的存在性與假設修法上,∴ 判 isReal=false。

信心 0.78 而非更高:扣分項是 Finding-1 的凍結窗口 premise 我獨立查證後認為「合理存在」(新設計下 hint 期間 reels 確實會 spin,舊設計是凍結的)——若該 premise 後續確認為必修缺陷,則本 finding 作為「修 Finding-1 時要注意的耦合」會升格為有用的前置警示。但即便如此,它仍非本 changeset 的缺陷,且最簡修法未必撞此耦合。
